template_module.title: GOV.UK Conformance Review Template
template_module.description: Template for reviewing an existing piece of code or design for conformance with the GOV.UK Design System. The assistant should identify any deviations from the guidance and recommend fixes.

body.instruction: Review the provided code or design in the context of the GOV.UK Design System. Follow these steps:

checklist.entry: Identify the components and patterns used in the code.
Check whether each component or pattern is implemented according to the guidance (for example, correct class names, required elements present).
Evaluate accessibility aspects such as contrast ratios, focus management and semantics.
Highlight any deviations and suggest specific changes to bring the code into conformance.

body.instruction: Reference the GOV.UK Design System documentation for each observation and include citations. If the code appears to follow best practices, summarise how it meets the guidance.
